questionText: The new manager’s approach to solving the problem was extremely ______, as it involved looking at the issue from multiple perspectives.
explanation: 'comprehensive' = kapsamlı. Soruna çok yönlü bakmak kapsamlı bir yaklaşımdır.

questionText: Scientists have found that regular exercise can significantly ______ the risk of heart disease.
The company had to ______ its expansion plans due to the sudden economic downturn.
explanation: 'abandon' = vazgeçmek/terk etmek. Ekonomik kriz sebebiyle büyüme planlarından vazgeçildi.

questionText: The discovery of the ancient ruins provided ______ evidence of the existence of a lost civilization.
explanation: 'compelling' = ikna edici/güçlü. Kalıntılar güçlü kanıtlar sağladı.

questionText: He is a highly ______ scholar who has published numerous books on medieval history.
explanation: 'distinguished' = seçkin/saygın. Çok kitap yayımlayan seçkin bir akademisyen.

questionText: The virus is highly ______, so people are advised to stay home if they show any symptoms.
Her ______ efforts to help the poor have earned her the respect of the entire community.
The architect’s design was both ______ and functional, earning him several awards.
The manager’s ______ decision to invest in the new start-up proved to be very profitable.
explanation: 'shrewd' = akıllıca/kurnazca. Karlı olduğu için akıllıca bir karar.

questionText: The report ______ the need for more investment in public transportation.
The pollution in the river has reached ______ levels, posing a threat to aquatic life.
The new law aims to ______ the gap between the rich and the poor.
explanation: 'bridge the gap' = aradaki farkı kapatmak/köprü kurmak.

questionText: The team’s failure was largely ______ to a lack of communication among the members.
The results of the study are ______, meaning further research is needed.
The earthquake caused ______ damage to the historical buildings in the city center.
The witness provided a ______ description of the suspect, which helped the police find him.
The company’s strategy is designed to ______ profits while minimizing costs.
The teacher’s ______ instructions made it easy for the students to complete the assignment.
The patient’s condition has started to ______, much to the relief of his family.
The new technology has ______ the way we communicate with people around the world.
The committee decided to ______ the meeting until next week because of the holiday.
The CEO is known for her ______ leadership style, which encourages collaboration.
The government is taking measures to ______ environmental pollution.
The suspect’s ______ was questionable, as he had no clear reason for being at the scene.
The new software is ______ with older operating systems, so you don't need to upgrade.
The team achieved a ______ victory, winning by more than 50 points.
The professor provided a ______ overview of the history of the Roman Empire.
The company’s growth has been ______, with profits increasing every year.
The artist’s work is characterized by its ______ use of color and light.
The results of the election were ______ until the very last ballot was counted.
Although the weather was extremely cold and snowy, ______.
options: we decided to stay at home all day
the football match was played as scheduled
no one wanted to go outside
the roads were blocked by ice
it was a typical winter day
explanation: 'Although' zıtlık bekler. Hava soğuk olmasına 'rağmen' maç oynandı.

questionText: Because the forest fire was spreading so rapidly toward the village, ______.
options: the residents decided to stay in their homes
the local authorities ordered an immediate evacuation
everyone felt very safe and calm
the rain started to fall heavily</u>
the trees were growing faster than ever
explanation: 'Because' sebep-sonuç bağlar. Yangın yayıldığı için 'tahliye emri verildi'.

questionText: The new bridge will not only reduce traffic congestion in the city center ______.
options: but it will also make commuting much faster
instead of being built with modern materials
although it costs a lot of money to maintain
because of the high number of cars on the road
so that everyone can walk over it easily

questionText: Unless the government takes immediate action against air pollution, ______.
options: the air quality will improve significantly
public health will continue to deteriorate
people will be very happy with the situation
it is going to be easy to breathe
everything will return to normal soon
explanation: 'Unless' (-mezse) olumsuz bir sonuç bekler. Önlem alınmazsa 'sağlık kötüleşmeye devam edecek'.

questionText: Before the new law was implemented by the parliament, ______.
options: many people have already left the country
several protest rallies had been organized
everyone will be very happy with the changes
it is going to be difficult to find a job
no one knows about the new regulations
explanation: 'Before' past olayları bağlarken Past Perfect (had been) uyumludur.

questionText: In spite of being highly qualified for the position, ______.
options: he was offered the job immediately
he was rejected by the selection committee
he has many years of experience
explanation: 'In spite of' zıtlık bekler. Nitelikli olmasına 'rağmen' reddedildi.

questionText: Provided that you follow the instructions provided in the manual, ______.
options: the machine shouldn't give you any trouble
it is going to be broken in a few days
none of the students can understand it
no one is allowed to use it
you are going to fail the assignment

questionText: So as to reduce the amount of plastic waste in the oceans, ______.
options: many countries are promoting recycling programs
people keep using single-use plastic bottles
the pollution is getting worse every year
it is too late to take any action
no one cares about environmental issues
explanation: 'So as to' (amacıyla). Atığı azaltmak 'amacıyla' geri dönüşüm teşvik ediliyor.

questionText: No sooner had the presentation started ______.
options: than the power went out in the whole building
that the manager arrived at the office

questionText: Even if the cost of living continues to rise in big cities, ______.
options: people will still move there for better job opportunities
everyone is going to leave for the countryside
it is impossible to find a cheap apartment
the government will stop all investments
explanation: 'Even if' (-se bile) zıtlık/kararlılık bildirir. Hayat pahalılığı artsa bile 'insanlar gelmeye devam edecek'.

questionText: While some experts argue that social media is harmful to children, ______.
options: others believe it can be a great educational tool
most of them agree that it should be banned
parents are not worried about their safety
children spend more time on it than ever
it is becoming less popular every day
explanation: 'While' (-irken) karşılaştırma yapar. Bazıları zararlı derken 'diğerleri faydalı diyor'.

questionText: By the time the search party finally found the lost hikers, ______.
options: they have been missing for three days
they had been missing for over forty-eight hours
everyone is very happy to see them again
they will be safe in a few moments
no one was worried about their safety
explanation: 'By the time' past girişi Past Perfect (had been) ile devam eder.

questionText: No matter how many times she explained the rules of the game, ______.
options: some students still couldn't grasp them
it was a very successful session
the students finished the game quickly
everyone was eager to start playing
explanation: 'No matter how' zıtlık bekler. Kaç kez anlatsa da 'bazıları kavrayamadı'.

questionText: Scarcely had the plane taken off ______.
options: when one of the engines failed suddenly
than the passengers were served lunch
after the pilot made an announcement
while everyone was watching a movie
before the weather started to improve

questionText: Since the company hasn't made any profit in the last two years, ______.
options: the board of directors decided to close it down
they are planning to hire more employees
everyone is going to get a large bonus
it is one of the most successful firms
the manager is very happy with the results
explanation: 'Since' (çünkü/-dığı için). Kâr etmediği için 'kapatma kararı aldılar'.

questionText: If you hadn't arrived so late to the interview yesterday, ______.
options: you might have been offered the position
you are going to lose the opportunity
it is impossible to find a job now
no one hears what you are saying

questionText: Despite the fact that he was very tired after the long journey, ______.
options: he decided to go straight to bed
he insisted on finishing his project tonight
everyone advised him to take a rest
he couldn't sleep at all that night
explanation: Zıtlık: Yorgun olmasına 'rağmen' projesini bitirmekte ısrar etti.

questionText: The reason why the experiment failed so unexpectedly was ______.
options: because the temperature was not controlled properly
that everyone was very happy with the results</u>
so that they could repeat it next month
although the team worked very hard
unless they find more funding for it

questionText: Now that everyone has finished their work and submitted it, ______.
options: we can all go home and enjoy the weekend
everyone must start a new assignment now
it is too early to celebrate anything
no one is allowed to leave the office
the deadline has passed two hours ago

questionText: Instead of complaining about the situation all the time, ______.
options: you should try to find a practical solution
everyone is very unhappy with your attitude
the problem will never be solved
nothing is going to change in the future
it is a very difficult problem to solve
explanation: Öneri: Şikayet etmek yerine 'çözüm bulmaya çalışmalısın'.

questionText: The more you practice speaking English with native speakers, ______.
options: the more fluent you will become over time
it is going to be difficult to understand
you should study more grammar rules
it is important to listen more

questionText: Hardly any students could answer the final question ______.
options: because it was extremely complicated and long
although it was based on the first chapter
so that they can graduate this year
while the teacher was explaining it
unless they study very hard tonight
explanation: Çoğu öğrenci soruyu cevaplayamadı 'çünkü çok karmaşıktı'.

questionText: In order to protect the historical site from further damage, ______.
options: the government has restricted the number of visitors
everyone is allowed to enter freely
it is going to be a popular tourist attraction
no one cares about history anymore

questionText: Regardless of whether you win or lose the competition tomorrow, ______.
options: you should be proud of your hard work
everyone is going to be very disappointed
you are not allowed to participate again
it is a waste of time and energy
no one will remember it next week
explanation: 'Regardless of' (bakılmaksızın). Kazansan da kaybetsen de 'gurur duymalısın'.

questionText: Considering the high risk of infection in the crowded areas, ______.
options: everybody feels very safe and healthy
nothing needs to be changed in behavior
it is not necessary to take any precautions
the infection rate is very low

questionText: Judging from the dark clouds in the sky, ______.
options: it is likely to rain heavily very soon
the weather is going to be sunny all day
everyone wants to go for a swim
it is a perfect day for a picnic
no one needs an umbrella today

questionText: Had I known that it was going to be a surprise party, ______.
options: I wouldn't have mentioned it to anyone
everyone is going to be very surprised
it is impossible to keep a secret
no one is coming to the party tonight
I am going to bring a small gift

questionText: Supposing that the earth's temperature rises by another two degrees, ______.
options: polar ice caps will melt much faster
everything is going to be much colder
agriculture will be easier in the north
it is not a cause for concern yet
no one wants to live in the city
explanation: 'Supposing that' (varsayalım ki). Sıcaklık artarsa 'buzullar hızlı eriyecek'.

questionText: Much as I would like to help you with your project tonight, ______.
options: I have a lot of work of my own to finish
it is going to be a great success
no one is allowed to enter the office
you should ask someone else for help
explanation: 'Much as' (her ne kadar ... olsa da). Yardım etmek istesem de 'kendi işim çok'.

questionText: As though he were an expert on the subject of astrophysics, ______.
options: he started explaining the details of black holes
he doesn't know anything about science
everyone was laughing at his speech
it is a very difficult topic to understand
no one asked him any questions
explanation: 'As though' (sanki ... gibi). Sanki uzmanmış 'gibi anlatmaya başladı'.

questionText: The meeting was postponed ______ the CEO's unexpected illness.
______ his lack of experience, he was hired for the senior position.
She studied hard ______ she could pass the Bar exam on her first attempt.
We should take our umbrellas ______ it rains later this afternoon.
The company failed to make a profit ______ they invested heavily in marketing.
It was ______ a hot day that we decided to go to the beach.
I am not sure ______ he will be able to attend the ceremony tonight.
Regardless ______ the cost, we must finish the project by Friday.
______ not only the staff but also the manager was impressed by her performance.
You can stay here ______ you don't make too much noise.
He is looking for a job ______ he can use his language skills.
The book, ______ was written by a famous historian, is very informative.
I haven't seen him ______ he moved to London three years ago.
She decided to take the bus ______ her car was in the garage for repairs.
He is very rich; ______, he never spends any money on luxury items.
He stayed at home ______ protect his health during the pandemic.
______ she was very tired, she continued to work until midnight.
We arrived at the airport ______ time for our flight to Paris.
The project was completed ______ schedule, despite some technical issues.
He is ______ intelligent ______ he can solve any complex problem easily.
Neither the students ______ the teacher was happy with the exam results.
You must decide ______ you want to stay here or go back home.
He did not go to work ______ he was feeling very ill.
The house ______ we lived ten years ago has been demolished.
I will wait for you ______ you arrive at the station.
I like tea, ______ my sister prefers coffee.
______ the pandemic, many people started working from home.
She didn't sleep well ______ the noise coming from the street.
If you are interested ______ art, you should visit the Louvre museum.
The bridge was named ______ the famous engineer who designed it.
Global warming is one of the most serious challenges facing humanity today.
options: Küresel ısınma bugün insanlığın karşılaştığı en ciddi zorluklardan biridir.
İnsanlık bugün küresel ısınma gibi pek çok ciddi sorunla mücadele ediyor.
Küresel ısınmanın insanlık üzerindeki etkileri her geçen gün artmaktadır.
Dünya bugün küresel ısınma nedeniyle büyük bir kriz içerisindedir.
En ciddi zorluk olan küresel ısınma insanlığı tehdit ediyor.
explanation: Doğru çeviri: 'Global warming is... facing humanity' = 'insanlığın karşılaştığı...'

questionText: The government announced a new set of measures to combat high inflation.
options: Hükümet yüksek enflasyonla mücadele için yeni bir önlemler paketi açıkladı.
Yüksek enflasyonla mücadele etmek hükümetin en önemli önceliğidir.
Enflasyon oranlarını düşürmek için hükümet yeni kararlar aldı.
Hükümetin açıkladığı yeni önlemler enflasyonu düşürmeye odaklanacak.
Yeni önlemler açıklandı çünkü hükümet enflasyondan şikayetçi.
explanation: Anew set of measures = yeni bir önlemler paketi. Combat = mücadele.

questionText: Scientific research has proven that a balanced diet is essential for a long life.
options: Bilimsel araştırmalar dengeli beslenmenin uzun ömür için şart olduğunu kanıtlamıştır.
Uzun bir ömür sürmek için dengeli beslenmek gerektiğini bilim insanları söylüyor.
Araştırmalara göre sağlıklı ve uzun bir yaşam için her şeyi yemek gerekir.
Dengeli beslenmenin uzun ömür üzerindeki etkileri bilimsel olarak kanıtlandı.
Bilim insanları kaliteli bir yaşam için beslenmenin önemini vurguluyor.

questionText: The digital revolution has fundamentally changed the way we access information.
options: Dijital devrim, bilgiye erişim şeklimizi temelden değiştirdi.
Bilgiye ulaşmak dijital devrim sayesinde her zamankinden daha kolay hale geldi.
Hızla değişen dijital dünya, bilgi kaynaklarını da etkilemektedir.
Dijital yöntemler bilgiye erişimimizi hızlandıran en önemli unsurdur.
Bilgiye nasıl eriştiğimiz artık tamamen dijital dünyayla ilgilidir.
explanation: Fundamentally changed = temelden değiştirdi. Access = erişim.

questionText: Developing sustainable energy sources is crucial for protecting the environment.
options: Sürdürülebilir enerji kaynakları geliştirmek çevreyi korumak için hayati önem taşır.
Çevreyi korumak isteyen ülkeler sürdürülebilir enerjiye yönelmelidir.
Sürdürülebilir enerji kullanımı çevre kirliliğini azaltan en etkili yöntemdir.
Gelecekte çevreyi korumak için sadece güneş enerjisine ihtiyaç duyulacak.
Çevre koruma projeleri sürdürülebilir kaynaklarla desteklenmelidir.

questionText: The author argues that cultural diversity is the greatest asset of a society.
options: Yazar, kültürel çeşitliliğin bir toplumun en büyük varlığı olduğunu savunuyor.
Toplumların zenginliği sahip oldukları kültürel farklılıklara dayanmaktadır.
Yazara göre kültürel farklılıklar toplumları bir arada tutan en önemli güçtür.
Kültürel çeşitliliğin toplumdaki önemi yazar tarafından vurgulanmaktadır.
Yazarın eserinde kültürel mirasın bir toplum için değeri anlatılıyor.

questionText: Technological advancements have made remote working possible for many employees.
options: Teknolojik ilerlemeler pek çok çalışan için uzaktan çalışmayı mümkün kılmıştır.
Uzaktan çalışmak isteyenler için teknoloji artık her türlü imkanı sunuyor.
Çalışanlar artık teknoloji sayesinde işlerini evlerinden yürütebiliyorlar.
Teknolojinin sunduğu imkanlar uzaktan çalışmayı her geçen gün artırıyor.
Gelişen teknolojiyle birlikte çalışma hayatı tamamen değişmeye başladı.
explanation: Advancements = ilerlemeler. Remote working = uzaktan çalışma.

questionText: Reducing carbon emissions is necessary to reach the goals of the Paris Agreement.
options: Karbon emisyonlarını azaltmak Paris Anlaşması'nın hedeflerine ulaşmak için gereklidir.
Paris Anlaşması'nın en önemli hedefi karbon salınımını tamamen durdurmaktır.
Hedeflere ulaşmak için karbon emisyonlarının azaltılması şart olarak görülüyor.
Paris Anlaşması hükümetleri karbon emisyonlarını azaltmaya zorlamaktadır.
Karbon emisyonlarını azaltma çabaları Paris Anlaşması ile hız kazanmıştır.
explanation: Necessary = gerekli. Reach the goals = hedeflere ulaşmak.

questionText: Economic stability is required for attracting foreign investments to the country.
options: Ülkeye yabancı yatırım çekmek için ekonomik istikrar gereklidir.
Yabancı yatırımcılar istikrarlı ekonomisi olan ülkeleri tercih etmektedirler.
Ekonomik istikrar sağlandığında yabancı yatırımlar da ülkeye akacaktır.
Yabancı yatırımların ülkeye gelmesi için ekonomi güvenilir olmalıdır.
Hükümet yabancı yatırımcıları çekmek için ekonomik改革lar yapıyor.
explanation: Economic stability = ekonomik istikrar. Attracting = çekmek.

questionText: The rise of artificial intelligence raises important ethical and legal questions.
options: Yapay zekanın yükselişi önemli etik ve yasal soruları gündeme getiriyor.
Yapay zeka geliştikçe etik ve hukuksal sorunlar da artmaya başladı.
Hukuk ve etik kuralları yapay zekanın gelişimiyle yeniden tartışılıyor.
Yapay zekanın sunduğu imkanlar kadar yarattığı etik sorunlar da büyüktür.
Etik ve yasal olarak yapay zekanın sınırları hala belirlenmiş değildir.
explanation: Raises questions = soruları gündeme getiriyor/ortaya çıkarıyor.

questionText: Success in language learning depends on consistent practice and motivation.
options: Dil öğreniminde başarı, sürekli pratik ve motivasyona bağlıdır.
Pratik yapmayan ve motivasyonu düşük olanlar dil öğrenemezler.
Dil öğrenmek isteyenler için motivasyon en önemli başarı faktörüdür.
Sürekli çalışma ve istek dil öğrenmedeki başarının temel anahtarıdır.
Başarıya ulaşmak için dil öğrenirken her gün pratik yapmak gerekir.
explanation: Consistent practice = sürekli pratik. Depends on = bağlıdır.

questionText: Many species are at risk of extinction due to the loss of their natural habitats.
options: Doğal yaşam alanlarının kaybı nedeniyle pek çok tür yok olma riski altındadır.
Türlerin yok olmasının en önemli sebebi doğal ortamlarının bozulmasıdır.
Doğal yaşam alanları korunduğu sürece türler yok olma tehlikesi yaşamazlar.
Hızla bozulan çevre şartları nedeniyle pek çok canlı türü yok oluyor.
Doğal habitat kaybı, canlıların neslinin tükenmesine yol açan bir etkendir.
explanation: Extinction = yok olma. Loss of natural habitats = doğal yaşam alanlarının kaybı.

questionText: The company has decided to expand its operations in Asia and Latin America.
options: Şirket, Asya ve Latin Amerika'daki operasyonlarını genişletmeye karar verdi.
Asya ve Latin Amerika pazarına girmek şirketin en yeni stratejisidir.
Şirketin yeni kararı doğrultusunda operasyonlar dünyaya yayılacaktır.
Operasyonlarını genişletmek isteyen şirket Asya ve Latin Amerika'yı seçti.
Şirket Asya ve Latin Amerika ülkelerinde yeni projeler başlatıyor.

questionText: Exposure to loud music for long periods can cause permanent hearing damage.
options: Uzun süre yüksek sesle müzik dinlemek kalıcı işitme hasarına neden olabilir.
İşitme kaybı yaşamak istemeyenler uzun süre gürültüye maruz kalmamalıdır.
Yüksek müzik sesinin işitme duyusu üzerindeki etkileri oldukça fazladır.
Kalıcı hasarlara yol açabileceği için yüksek sesle müzik dinlenmemelidir.
Gürültülü ortamda bulunmak zamanla işitme fonksiyonlarını bozabilir.
explanation: Exposure = maruz kalmak. Permanent damage = kalıcı hasar.

questionText: The report highlights the importance of education in reducing poverty rates.
options: Rapor, yoksulluk oranlarını azaltmada eğitimin önemini vurguluyor.
Yoksulluğu bitirmek için eğitime verilen önem rapor tarafından açıklandı.
Rapora göre eğitim seviyesi arttıkça yoksulluk oranları düşmektedir.
Eğitimin yoksulluk üzerindeki etkileri raporda detaylıca anlatılmaktadır.
Yoksullukla mücadele etmek için rapor eğitimi en önemli araç görüyor.

questionText: Küresel ısınmanın önlenmesi için tüm dünya ülkelerinin iş birliği yapması gerekmektedir.
options: All countries in the world must cooperate to prevent global warming.
Global warming can only be prevented if countries work together.
Cooperation is essential for prevents the global warming in the world.
To prevent global warming, all nations should started to operate.
Nations must be in cooperation because of the global warming.
explanation: All countries must cooperate = tüm ülkeler iş birliği yapmalı.

questionText: Teknolojinin gelişmesiyle birlikte insanlar bilgiye çok daha hızlı ulaşabilmektedir.
options: With the development of technology, people can access information much faster.
Technology makes it possible for everyone to reaching the information.
Accessing information is faster now thanks to the new technologies.
People reaching information quickly because technology is developing.
As technology developed, people reached information faster.
explanation: Access information much faster = bilgiye çok daha hızlı ulaşmak.

questionText: İyi bir eğitim almak, gençlerin gelecekteki kariyerleri için çok önemlidir.
options: Receiving a good education is very important for the future careers of young people.
It is important for young people to getting a good education for career.
A good education is necessary for those who want a successful career.
Young people should takes a good education for their future.
Future careers of young people depends on having a great education.
explanation: Receiving a good education = iyi bir eğitim almak.

questionText: Dengeli beslenmek ve düzenli spor yapmak sağlıklı bir yaşam sürdürmeyi sağlar.
options: A balanced diet and regular exercise ensure maintaining a healthy life.
Eating balanced and doing sport is essential for be healthy.
To keep healthy life, you should eat balanced and do regular sport.
A healthy life can be maintain by balanced diet and regular exercise.
Maintaining a healthy life depends on your diet and exercise level.

questionText: Hükümetin yeni ekonomik politikaları enflasyonu düşürmeyi amaçlamaktadır.
options: The government's new economic policies aim to reduce inflation.
Inflation can be reduced by the new economic policies of the government.
Aiming to reduces inflation, the government took new economic actions.
New economic policies was introduced by government to lower inflation.
The target of the government's economic policies is reduce the inflation.

questionText: Çoğu uzman, çocukların ekran süresinin kısıtlanması gerektiğini savunuyor.
options: Most experts argue that children's screen time should be restricted.
Restricting children's screen time is advised by the most experts.
Experts believes that screen time must be limited for kids.
To protect children, screen time should be restricted by parents.
Most of the experts thinks that screen time is harmful for children.

questionText: Yeni projenin başarısı, ekip üyeleri arasındaki iş birliğine bağlıdır.
options: The success of the new project depends on the cooperation among team members.
Cooperation among staff is essential for the results of the project.
If team members works together, the project will be successful.
The project's success is related with the collaboration between team.
Success of the new projects determined by the team's cooperation.

questionText: Kirliliği azaltmak için yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarına yatırım yapmalıyız.
options: We must invest in renewable energy sources to reduce pollution.
To reduces pollution, investment in renewable energy is necessary.
Investing in renewable energy is a good way to lowers the pollution.
Pollution can be reduced if we starts to invest in energy sources.
Investment for renewable energy will help us to decrease pollution.

questionText: Bir yabancı dil öğrenmek, beyin fonksiyonlarını geliştirir ve hafızayı güçlendirir.
options: Learning a foreign language improves brain functions and strengthens memory.
Brain functions improves and memory gets stronger with a new language.
Strength of memory and brain function increases by learning a language.
Learning new languages is good for brain function and memory strength.
A foreign language simplifies the brain functions and builds memory.

questionText: Son yıllarda artan hava kirliliği, insan sağlığı üzerinde ciddi tehditler oluşturmaktadır.
options: Increasing air pollution in recent years poses serious threats to human health.
Human health is threatened by the air pollution that increased recently.
Air pollution is increasing and posing a threats on human health.
Posing serious threats, air pollution has been increased recently.
Health issues is caused by the air pollution of the recent years.

questionText: Hızla büyüyen şehirler, altyapı ve ulaşım sorunlarını da beraberinde getirmektedir.
options: Rapidly growing cities also bring about infrastructure and transportation problems.
Infrastructure and transportation issues is caused by growing cities.
Growing cities brings with them infrastructure and transport issue.
Rapidly growth of the cities leads to the problems of infrastructure.
Problem of infrastructure and transportation occurs in large cities.

questionText: Eğitim seviyesinin yükselmesi, bir ülkenin sosyo-ekonomik gelişimini hızlandırır.
options: The rise in education level accelerates a country's socio-economic development.
Socio-economic development of a country is accelerated by education.
Education levels increases and country's development gets faster.
Increasing education level helps to socio-economic growth of nation.
Rising level of education accelerates the growth of the country.

questionText: Kuşların göç yolları, iklim değişikliği nedeniyle son yıllarda değişmeye başladı.
options: The migration routes of birds have started to change in recent years due to climate change.
Due to climate change, birds are changing their route of migration.
Migration of birds changed recently because the climate is changing.
Climate change causes the change in birds migration routes recently.
Bird's routes for migration started to changes because of climate.

questionText: Düzenli uyku, hem fiziksel hem de zihinsel sağlık için vazgeçilmez bir unsurdur.
options: Regular sleep is an indispensable element for both physical and mental health.
Indispensable element of health is having a regular sleep every night.
For both mental and physical health, you should sleep regularly.
Physical and mental health is ensured by the regular sleep cycle.
Sleep is essential for health, both for physical and mental well-being.

questionText: Yeni araştırmalar, bitki bazlı beslenmenin çevre için daha yararlı olduğunu gösteriyor.
options: New research shows that a plant-based diet is more beneficial for the environment.
Environment is more benefited from a plant-based diet according to study.
Plant-based diets are better for the nature, new research proves.
Recent studies suggest that eating plants is good for environmental.
New research indicates that environment needs plant-based diets.

questionText: Climate change is a global phenomenon. It affects everything from the weather to the food chain. ______. This loss leads to the extinction of many species that cannot adapt to the new conditions.
options: Scientists are trying to find new ways to reduce carbon emissions.
One of its most significant impacts is the destruction of natural habitats.
Many people are still unaware of the dangers of global warming.
Economic stability is essential for international cooperation.
Renewable energy is becoming cheaper every day around the world.
explanation: Boşluktan sonraki 'This loss' (bu kayıp) ifadesi 'destruction of natural habitats' (doğal yaşam alanlarının yıkımı) ile tam örtüşmektedir.

questionText: The Industrial Revolution marked a major turning point in history. It began in Great Britain in the late 18th century and spread to other parts of the world. ______. As a result, the way people lived and worked changed forever.
options: It was a period of great artistic and cultural growth in Europe.
This era saw the transition from manual labor to machine-based manufacturing.
Many famous scientists lived during this period of time.
Agriculture was the most important economic activity before then.
The invention of the internet revolutionized the way we work.
explanation: Paragraf sanayi devrimini anlattığı için 'elle çalışmadan makineye geçiş' uygun devamdır.

questionText: Archaeology is the study of human history through material remains. Excavations allow scientists to discover tools, pottery, and buildings from the past. ______. By analyzing these artifacts, we gain a better understanding of how ancient people lived.
options: These remains provide valuable information about ancient cultures.
Modern technology is often used in medical research today.
Many schools offer courses on history and social studies.
It is difficult to preserve these artifacts for future generations.
Volunteers are always needed for archaeological excavations.
explanation: Boşluktan sonraki 'these artifacts' (bu eserler) ifadesi 'these remains' (bu kalıntılar) ile bağlantılıdır.

questionText: Artificial Intelligence is becoming more integrated into our daily lives. From virtual assistants to self-driving cars, the technology is everywhere. ______. Some worry about job losses, while others fear the loss of human control over machines.
options: However, its rapid development raises significant ethical concerns.
Computer scientists are working on improved software designs.
Artificial intelligence is expected to boost the global economy.
Education is key to understanding complex new technologies.
Many companies are investing heavily in AI research today.
explanation: Boşluktan sonraki 'Some worry...' (Bazıları endişeleniyor) ifadesi 'ethical concerns' (etik endişeler) ile uyumludur.

questionText: Renaissance was a period of great cultural and artistic revival in Europe. It began in Italy in the 14th century and spread throughout the continent. ______. Famous figures like Leonardo da Vinci and Michelangelo emerged during this era.
options: It marked the transition from the Middle Ages to the modern world.
The Black Death had a devastating effect on the population.
Most people at the time were farmers living in small villages.
Trade routes were expanded between the East and the West.
Gutenberg's printing press was invented much later in history.
explanation: Rönesans'ın Orta Çağ'dan moderne geçişi simgelemesi genel bilgiyi tamamlar.

questionText: The internet has revolutionized the way we communicate. We can send messages across the world in seconds. ______. This constant connectivity has made it easier for people to work and socialize from anywhere.
options: Social media platforms have millions of active users today.
We no longer have to wait days or weeks for letters to arrive.
Security concerns are becoming more important every day.
Cyberbullying is a serious problem for younger generations.
High-speed internet is still not available in some remote areas.
explanation: Girişteki 'send messages in seconds' (saniyeler içinde mesaj gönderimi) vurgulanmaktadır.

questionText: Biodiversity is essential for the health of our planet. Every species, no matter how small, plays a role in the ecosystem. ______. This balance provides us with clean air, water, and food.
options: Human activities are the main cause of habitat destruction.
It is a complex web of life that maintains natural balance.
Many species are at risk of extinction due to climate change.
Governments should pass laws to protect endangered species.
Educating the public is crucial for environmental protection.
explanation: Ecosystem ve balance kelimeleri arasındaki 'complex web of life' bağlantısı.

questionText: The solar system consists of the sun and the celestial objects that orbit it. There are eight major planets, each with unique characteristics. ______. For instance, Jupiter is the largest, while Mercury is the smallest.
options: These planets vary significantly in their size and composition.
Scientists are searching for life on other planets like Mars.
The sun provides the energy needed for life on Earth.
Gravity is the force that keeps the planets in their orbits.
Space exploration has been a major goal for many decades.
explanation: Örnekleme (For instance) Jüpiter ve Merkür'ün boyutlarını (size) kıyasladığı için 'size' ifadesi olan şık uygundur.

questionText: Public speaking is a skill that many people find difficult. The fear of speaking in front of a crowd is very common. ______. By preparing well and practicing often, anyone can become a confident speaker.
options: However, it is a skill that can be improved with practice.
Most successful leaders are great at communicating with others.
Some people are naturally born with better speaking abilities.
The audience usually wants the speaker to be successful.
Nervousness is a normal reaction when speaking in public.

questionText: Microplastics are tiny plastic particles that are less than five millimeters long. They can come from larger plastic debris or from personal care products. ______. This leads to the contamination of the food chain, affecting both animals and humans.
options: They are now found in every corner of the world's oceans.
Reducing plastic use is the best way to solve the problem.
Many marine animals accidentally eat these small particles.
Scientists are studying the health effects of microplastics.
Recycling programs are not yet efficient enough to stop them.
explanation: 'Food chain' (besin zinciri) ve 'affecting animals' (hayvanları etkilemesi) ipuçlarıdır.

questionText: Vaccination is one of the greatest achievements of modern medicine. It has prevented millions of deaths from diseases like polio and smallpox. ______. This concept, known as herd immunity, protects those who cannot be vaccinated.
options: When most of a population is immune, the disease cannot spread.
Some people are still hesitant to get their children vaccinated.
Doctors recommend getting a flu shot every single year.
New vaccines are being developed for many different viruses.
Health organizations work hard to distribute vaccines globally.
explanation: Boşluktan sonraki 'herd immunity' (sürü bağışıklığı) tanımı yapılıyor.

questionText: Renewable energy comes from natural sources that are constantly replenished. Solar, wind, and hydroelectric power are the most common forms. ______. Unlike fossil fuels, they do not release harmful greenhouse gases into the atmosphere.
options: These sources are much cleaner than traditional energy types.
Investing in green technology can boost the national economy.
The cost of solar panels has decreased over the last ten years.
Many countries are trying to reach net-zero emission goals.
Energy storage is still a major challenge for the industry.
explanation: Fosil yakıtlarla (fossil fuels) kıyaslama 'cleaner' (daha temiz) ifadesi ile yapılır.

questionText: Emotional intelligence is the ability to understand and manage your own emotions. It also involves recognizing the emotions of others. ______. Leaders with high emotional intelligence are better at resolving conflicts and motivating their teams.
options: This skill is increasingly valued in the professional world.
Some people believe that IQ is more important than EQ.
Practicing mindfulness can help improve emotional intelligence.
It is difficult to measure emotional intelligence accurately.
Empathy is a key component of emotional intelligence.
explanation: İş dünyasında (professional world) öneminden bahsederek liderliğe geçiş.

questionText: Deforestation is a major environmental problem in the Amazon rainforest. Trees are being cut down for timber and to create space for agriculture. ______. This process also contributes to climate change by releasing stored carbon.
options: This destroying of forests leads to a significant loss of biodiversity.
Many indigenous people live in the depths of the rainforest.
The Amazon is often called the 'lungs of the world' by many.
Reforestation projects are being implemented in some areas.
Strict laws are needed to stop illegal logging activities.
explanation: Biyoçeşitlilik kaybı ve karbon salınımı arasındaki bağlantı.

questionText: The human brain is a complex organ that controls every function of the body. It processes information and allows us to think, feel, and move. ______. Scientists are still working to understand all of its mysteries.
options: Despite decades of research, much of the brain remains unknown.
Modern medicine can now treat many neurological disorders.
Exercise and a healthy diet are good for brain health.
The brain is divided into several different lobes and areas.
Computers are now being designed to mimic the human brain.
explanation: 'Still working to understand' (hala anlamaya çalışıyorlar) 'remains unknown' (bilinmeyen kalıyor) ile uyumludur.

questionText: By the time we reach the summit, the sun ______ already ______.
explanation: Future Perfect (By the time + Present -> Future Perfect).

questionText: If I ______ the lottery, I would travel around the world for a year.
Not only ______ the experiment, but he also wrote a detailed report about it.
I ______ my keys! Have you seen them anywhere?
explanation: Present Perfect (Etkisi süren / yeni gerçekleşen eylem).

questionText: If you ______ more attention in class, you wouldn't have failed the exam.
explanation: Type 3 Conditional (If + had V3, would have V3).

questionText: Hardly ______ the meeting started when the fire alarm went off.
She ______ in this city for over ten years now.
I wish I ______ how to speak Spanish fluently.
No sooner ______ finished the race than she collapsed from exhaustion.
I ______ the movie last night, and it was quite disappointing.
If it ______ for your advice, I wouldn't be in this successful position today.
explanation: Mixed Conditional (If it hadn't been for... today).

questionText: Never ______ seen such a beautiful sunset in my life.
Scientists ______ for a cure for cancer for many decades.
I ______ to the gym every morning when I was a student.
explanation: Geçmiş alışkanlık (When I was a student).

questionText: By the end of this year, they ______ the construction of the new school.
explanation: Future Perfect (By the end of this year).

questionText: ______ had the concert begun than it started to rain heavily.
______ had I arrived at the station when the train pulled out.
If I ______ you, I would think twice before making such a decision.
The police ______ the suspect for three hours before he finally confessed.
explanation: Past Perfect Continuous (Geçmişte bir ana kadar süregelen eylem).

questionText: I ______ my lunch yet, so I am very hungry.
Rarely ______ seen such a talented young musician.
Little ______ know that he was about to face the biggest challenge of his life.
Only after I had finished my work ______ I realize that I had made a big mistake.
Under no circumstances ______ you leave the building without permission.
Not until she called me ______ that the meeting had been cancelled.
Had I ______ more time, I would have completed the assignment properly.
Should you ______ any questions, please do not hesitate to ask.
Were I ______ you, I would accept the job offer immediately.
If he ______ harder, he would be successful now.
I ______ the report by the time the manager arrives at the office tomorrow.
explanation: Future Perfect (By the time + Present -> Future Perfect).
